channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: I Used Lyapunov Stability Theory to Monitor LLM Agents — Here's What Actually Worked and What Didn't
item.description: The Elephant in the Room: "Isn't This Just max_iterations?" Let me address this up front. If you're building a ReAct loop with a single LLM and 10 tool calls, you do not need a physics-inspired...

item.title: Chrome 126+ Broke My WXT Extension Dev Setup — Here's What Changed and How to Fix It
item.description: I spent a weekend debugging a Chrome extension dev environment that stopped working after a Chrome update. No error messages. The extension loaded — I could open its options page — but content...

item.title: Walk-to-Unlock: How I built a privacy-first app blocker that uses your phone's step counter
item.description: Walk-to-Unlock: How I built a privacy-first app blocker that uses your phone's step counter I spent the last six months building StepShield Pro, a digital wellbeing app for Android with a twist:...

item.title: Deploying JupyterLab Interactive Notebook IDE on Ubuntu 24.04
item.description: JupyterLab is the next-generation web-based IDE for the Jupyter ecosystem, with notebook editing, file browsing, a terminal, and rich interactive outputs in one workspace. This guide deploys...

item.title: Deploying Plex Home Media Streaming on Ubuntu 24.04
item.description: Plex is a personal media server that organizes and streams your movies, TV shows, music, and photos to clients on every major platform, with metadata, transcoding, and remote access built in. This...

item.title: Moving Conversation Memory from RAM to Redis: Boosting Long-Term Accuracy from 63% to 98%
item.description: It was 1 a.m. when a client posted a screenshot in the group chat: "I literally just said I love cats, and this thing immediately recommends dog food?" Instantly, the product manager @-mentioned...

item.title: Deploying Redis In-Memory Data Store on Ubuntu 24.04
item.description: Redis is an open-source in-memory data store used as a cache, message broker, and primary database for low-latency workloads. This guide deploys Redis using Docker Compose with both RDB snapshots...

item.title: Deploying RabbitMQ Message Broker System on Ubuntu 24.04
item.description: RabbitMQ is an open-source message broker implementing AMQP and other protocols, used to decouple producers and consumers across distributed applications. This guide deploys RabbitMQ using Docker...

item.title: Deploying Kafka Distributed Event Streaming on Ubuntu 24.04
item.description: Apache Kafka is an open-source distributed event streaming platform used for real-time pipelines, log aggregation, and event-driven architectures. This guide deploys a single-node Kafka 4.x...

item.title: Deploying Elasticsearch Search and Analytics Engine on Ubuntu 24.04
item.description: Elasticsearch is an open-source distributed search and analytics engine built on Apache Lucene, used for full-text search, structured queries, and log analytics. This guide deploys a single-node...

item.title: People are leaving a lot of weird stuff in their robotaxis
item.description: A unicorn Beanie Baby. A 15-pound green bowling ball. A pair of dentures. These are just some of the items left behind in robotaxis in the past year, according to Uber's annual Lost and Found...

item.title: AI-Driven Exploitation is Destroying Vulnerability Management. Here’s How to Handle It.
item.description: AI-driven exploitation timelines are rapidly shrinking, and they are not going to stop shrinking. Vulnerabilities are being discovered, reproduced, and weaponized faster than ever in the history...

item.title: Rehumanizing global health care with agentic AI
item.description: The global health care sector is under increasing strain. Decades of chronic underinvestment and constraints in recruitment have coincided with a surge in demand for services for aging...

item.title: The Intersection of Encryption and AI
item.description: As part of their 20th Anniversary celebration, Dark Reading asked five cybersecurity industry leaders who wrote blogs or columns for them over the years to select their favorite piece and share...

item.title: Microsoft Threatening Security Researcher
item.description: An anonymous security researcher called “Nightmare Eclipse” has been publishing a series of significant security exploits against Microsoft Windows—including one that breaks BitLocker. Microsoft...

item.title: How to watch Microsoft’s Build 2026 conference
item.description: Microsoft is kicking off its yearly Build developer conference in San Francisco today, sandwiched between the recent Google I/O and Apple's upcoming WWDC event. While tickets to attend Build in...

item.title: How Leading Organizations Are Turning EDR Into Operational Resilience
item.description: Most organizations now recognize that endpoint protection alone is no longer sufficient. That's why adoption of endpoint detection and response (EDR) has accelerated rapidly in recent years....

item.title: The Trump Administration Is at War With Itself Over AI Regulation
item.description: Donald Trump killed an executive order to regulate AI. Now, administration officials and AI executives are trying to figure out if there’s anything left to piece back together.

item.title: Pakistan-Linked SideCopy Targets Afghanistan Finance Ministry with Xeno RAT
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a spear-phishing campaign likely undertaken by the Pakistan-aligned SideCopy group targeting Afghanistan's Ministry of Finance with an...

item.title: How small businesses can leverage AI
item.description: This article is from Making AI Work, MIT Technology Review’s limited-run newsletter examining how to apply LLMs across industries. To receive it in your inbox,sign up here. From accounting to...

item.title: Dashlane Discloses Brute-Force Attack, Encrypted Vaults of Fewer Than 20 Users Downloaded
item.description: Password manager Dashlane has disclosed that "fewer than" 20 users on the personal subscription plan had their encrypted vaults downloaded following a brute-force attack launched by an unknown...

item.title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
item.description: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.

item.title: Alphabet plans to raise $80B to pay for AI buildout
item.description: "The company is experiencing strong demand for its AI solutions and services from enterprises and consumers, at levels that are exceeding the company’s available supply," Alphabet said in its...

item.title: Nvidia chases $200B CPU market with AI agent PCs from Microsoft, Dell, and HP
item.description: If Nvidia has cracked a way to bring AI agents easily, safely, and usefully to the masses, it could — and should — be big.

item.title: The Google Pixel Watch 5 may have been spoiled by… the creator of Borderlands
item.description: We may just have gotten an early look at the Google Pixel Watch 5 - and from an unusual source. Randy Pitchford, the creator of the Borderlands game franchise, posted a pair of images of a watch...

item.title: Pebblebee’s Halo can help track lost items and keep you safe, and it’s on sale for $50
item.description: If you’re planning to travel this summer, both a Bluetooth tracker and a personal safety device can come in handy, especially if you’ll be exploring on your own. The Pebblebee Halo combines those...

item.title: Florida sues OpenAI, Sam Altman, in first-of-its-kind lawsuit over violent incidents
item.description: The lawsuit partially revolves around a shooting at Florida State University last year, and ChatGPT's alleged role in the incident.

item.title: This could be Windows’ M1 moment — but expect it to cost a ton
item.description: Nvidia's announcement that it's getting into the consumer laptop chip space with RTX Spark is huge. Apple has proved for years that Arm-based chips can perform incredibly well while also...

item.title: Gemini’s new AI agent is about as good as Google’s demo
item.description: Google's new "24/7" AI agent, Gemini Spark, can be shockingly good at doing things on your behalf. But I'm not sure it's worth the financial cost and potential privacy tradeoffs. The company gave...

item.title: Dozens of Red Hat packages backdoored through its official NPM channel
item.description: Anyone who has downloaded affected Red Hat packages should investigate immediately.
